arts.ttl: Real Madrid learn outcome of Jude Bellingham red card appeal
arts.sum: La Liga champions Real Madrid have on Friday been made aware of the outcome of their appeal to have Jude Bellingham’s recent red card overturned. Midfielder Bellingham was of course…

arts.ttl: Neymar hails Real Madrid star: ‘He’s a joke’
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Neymar Jr. this week moved to reveal his appreciation for the talents of a member of the attacking ranks at Real Madrid. The player in question? Rodrygo.…
